summary.para: The provided <index-template> may contain multiple template names separated by a comma. If multiple template names are specified then there is no wildcard support and the provided names should match completely with existing templates.
Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
Comma-separated list of index template names used to limit the request. Wildcard (*) expressions are supported.
Period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
